clusters.name: FrenchFines — Node 8/Buster modernization
clusters.rationale: Single service holds 98% of remaining criticals. Node 8 on Debian Buster — both 5+ years past EOL. Closing this cluster requires Node 20 upgrade + base-image swap (PSDEV-62502) which is blocked on the ES production data migration (now complete).

clusters.name: Tariff-modifier facade — npm dependency bumps
clusters.rationale: Three criticals in one repo, all from outdated npm dependencies (axios + form-data + handlebars). Single PR with overrides closes the cluster. Closing today (2026-05-22).

clusters.name: sss-dbinit — minimist + braces overrides
clusters.rationale: Two criticals from `braces` and `minimist`, both transitive. Single npm overrides block in package.json closes both. Closing today (2026-05-22).
